## Checklist

- [ ] `npm --prefix api run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm --prefix api test` passes
- [ ] Red/green TDD rhythm preserved in commits (no squashing)
- [ ] Merge with **Rebase and merge** or **Create a merge commit** — *never* **Squash and merge**, which flattens the TDD history this project intentionally preserves
